subcodes.first_line: O My Leaf and My Handmaiden! Praise be to God that thou hast directed thyself unto the Most Great Objective and the Supreme Habitation, and the immortal Kawthar of His presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی الحمد لله قصد مقصد اقصی و مقر اعلی نمودی و کوثر بیزوال حضرت
